SOURCE: 27018550.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (27018550.pdf)
SUMMARY: Dedicated, Driven, and Dynamic with over 20 years of customer service expertise. Motivated to maintain customer satisfaction and contribute to company success with an emphasis in personnel and process management.
SKILLS: Type 50 wpm and 10-Key by touch, Microsoft programs Word, Excel, Access, Outlook, PowerPoint, Personnel management and Telephone inquiries specialist, Excellent customer service skills with call quality and customer satisfaction as primary focus., Inbound and Outbound contact center experience, Excellent oral and written presentation and seasoned in conflict resolution

SOURCE: 27018550.pdf
JOB TITLE: Hr Specialist
COMPANY: Accenture Peopleline Email Management Team. City, State
DATES: May 2007 - Oct 2008
DESCRIPTION: Received inbound emails from clients as initial point of contact to answer questions related to HR policies, practices or to resolve issues. Helped the client by answering their inquiry, resolving their issue or routing their email to a caseworker for resolution. Recorded and tracked the client issue via the case management tool from initiation to resolution. Maintained records of customer interactions and transactions.

SOURCE: 27018550.pdf
JOB TITLE: Customer Service Representative
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: Mar 2007 - Feb 2008
DESCRIPTION: Maintained records of customer interactions and transactions. Developed and implemented filing and delivery methods for FMLA and Short Term Disability documentation to respective global clientele. Facilitated communication for the Absence Management Team to clients and internal departmental teams. Organized and maintained payroll and people services database management system.

SOURCE: 27018550.pdf
JOB TITLE: Call Centre Shift Supervisor
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: Aug 2003 - Mar 2007
DESCRIPTION: Answered and dispatched calls for Medical and Professional clients in the San Antonio and surrounding areas. Provided call monitoring to ensure staff was adhering to quality call control. Maintained On Call books for various medical staff to ensure that the correct staff was contacted during after hours and weekends.

DEGREE: 
INSTITUTION: Business Administration Texas A&M Extension Services City, State
